changelog: Initial release: live channels, EPG, VOD, series, catch-up.
description: Connects Jellyfin to any Xtream Codes IPTV provider. Surfaces live channels with EPG guide, VOD movies, and series as native Jellyfin content. Supports catch-up TV for compatible channels.
name: Flux - Xtream Codes Client
overview: Xtream Codes IPTV client plugin for Jellyfin — live TV, EPG, VOD, and series.
